svg.text: The wire format, hot zones, and what compaction does
Real 21-message run: failing pytest, two reads, patch, rewrite, green run, follow-up. Numbers from the recipe code.
How read_file lands on the wire
File src/.../_filesystem.py read successfully. Content queued as user message.
The tool ack is tiny. The file body queues as a user message and stays in history unless compaction clips it.
